codex_review.summary: 0 CRITICAL, 0 HIGH. 1 MEDIUM (Redis singleton), 2 LOW (timing-safe edge case, queueFailedSync userId filter).

findings.message: Redis client re-instantiated on every request in checkRateLimit — should use module-level singleton.
timingSafeEqual length-mismatch path uses 1-byte dummy buffer — not fully constant-time.
queueFailedSync findUnique lacks userId filter — internal-only, low exploitability.
